name: HRMOS
description: Visionals all-in-one Japanese HR suite (ATS, core HR, evaluation) with REST APIs for recruiting automation.

seo.title: HRMOS — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: HRMOS: Visionals all-in-one Japanese HR suite (ATS, core HR, evaluation) with REST APIs for recruiting automation.

when_to_use: ATS and core HR in one system for Japanese recruiting
REST API integration linking HRMOS to payroll systems
Automated recruiting pipeline with evaluation workflows
Employee record management for Japanese compliance needs
Onboarding automation triggered by ATS stage advancement

pros: All-in-one JP HR suite with ATS
Core HR plus evaluation in one
cons: UI less modern than global rivals
review.verdict: Solid one-stop HR stack for Japanese companies; globally theres no compelling reason to pick it.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises wanting unified ATS, core HR, and evaluations with APIs
review.not_for: Non-Japanese teams or those preferring best-of-breed HR modules

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
